servers.name: osv-upgrade-test
servers.title: OSV (upgrade e2e fixture)
servers.description: OSV MCP server fixture for upgrade e2e tests (low tag). Mirrors the bundled osv entry's transport (streamable-http) and image exactly, pinned to the lower tag so the upgrade checker reports an available upgrade once repointed to registry-high.json. The transport url port 8080 is the image-INTERNAL target port (becomes RunConfig.TargetPort); thv still assigns an OS-chosen host proxy port, so there is no fixed host-port clash. Only the image tag differs between this file and registry-high.json.
